ranked_innovations.expected_gain: Coverage, not mechanism — but a genuinely open win: VERIFIED that VisualSwap publishes NO fix for ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B or Kimi-VL-A3B (Table 12 multi-turn = Qwen-8B/235B only; Table 9 amp = 8B only). A training-free single-pass fix on ERNIE/Kimi + 32B is unclaimed; largest gains expected on the 3x-more-vulnerable Thinking variants (ERNIE-Thinking drops 60.3pp). Do NOT overclaim a VRRL 'rebuttal' — VRRL never tested reflection-prompting on VS-Bench math, so frame it as orthogonal (training-free vs their SFT+GRPO), not same-turf refutation.
ranked_innovations.experiment: Run self-floor / global-2x / provenance-injection / best-method-from-Ranks-1-4 on Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct+Thinking, 32B-Thinking, ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B (I+T), Kimi-VL-A3B (I+T) x all 4 VS-Bench sources (MathVista/MathVerse/MathVision/MMMU-Pro). Primary metric faithful post-swap accuracy; report recovery fraction of the self-vs-user gap paired with Svis to show recovery WITHOUT magnitude monotonicity. Reframe our decomposition honestly: cite Appendix H (Table 15), claim only the identical-content authorship-flip cell.

plan.full_experiment_grid:
BENCHMARK/DATASETS: VS-Bench (arXiv:2605.15864) = 4 sources x 200 image pairs = 800: MathVista, MathVerse, MathVision, MMMU-Pro. Method development on the MathVerse split (200) + our legacy N~136 MathVerse subset for continuity; full 4-source only for the generalization panel and the final results table. MUST use their exact 3 scaffolds (Standard / Probe / Multi-turn, verified from PDF App F) so numbers are comparable to Tables 4/9/12.

METRICS (report ALL three together for every cell): (1) faithful post-swap accuracy (their protocol); (2) Visual Attention Score Svis = avg post-softmax image-token attention (their layer-18-21 and layer-55 style) — reported alongside accuracy so we can show accuracy up WITHOUT Svis up (the money plot); (3) non-swap RETENTION on unchanged control images, to catch over-correction. For mechanism: per-head answer-flip-to-correct effect + head-rank vs Svis correlation.

MODELS (primary -> generalization): Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking (PRIMARY: all methods + all mechanism); Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct (all methods); Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking (scale check, top methods only). Generalization panel (the open gap): ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B Instruct+Thinking, Kimi-VL-A3B Instruct+Thinking. Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B: OUT OF BUDGET on 4xL40 — cite their published numbers as external reference only.

METHODS (columns): self-floor(Probe); multi-turn ceiling; global-2x (renorm + no-renorm); PAI; CAST; [VisFlow, DMAS = stretch]; our prompt-level provenance-injection; PACD (lambda sweep); V_bal / V_disc / V_prov at matched M*; PSO provenance-vector (diff-of-means, alpha sweep) with the honest 'does diff-of-means beat the lexical relabel at all' ablation and orthogonalization off the magnitude component; magnitude-matched control (+225% retuned to M*); commit-then-revise 2x2 (relabel x KV-evict) + textual-omission control + KV-only control + random-span specificity control; writing-head-only operator.

SEEDS/PROTOCOL: VS-Bench decoding is greedy/deterministic — for greedy accuracy treat the 4 sources as the variance estimate and report per-source + mean. For any SAMPLED decoding (PACD lambda, steering alpha/beta sweeps): 3 seeds, mean +/- std. For steering-VECTOR methods (PSO, CAST, DMAS, V_disc) on small-N sets: 4-fold cross-validation (calib ~102 / test ~34 on N~136; or 150/50 on the 200-pair split), extract directions on calib ONLY, report mean +/- std to control small-N fragility. Hyperparameter selection (global-2x renorm choice; alpha; lambda; beta; head-set K in {8,16,32,all}) on held-out calib, reported on test — never tune on test.

COMPUTE (4xL40, ~192GB): 8B and 28B-A3B/A3B models fit comfortably; 32B fits with tensor-parallel + weight quantization; per-head path-patching feasible on 8B (N~136). 235B excluded. Estimated order: reproduce global-2x + multi-turn (small); the matched-M* arm set on 8B (medium); mechanism patching on 8B (medium, one-time); generalization panel across 6 model-variants x 4 sources (the largest single cost).

THREE NON-NEGOTIABLE GATES before any SOTA claim: (G1) reproduce global-2x +18.2pp in our own setup; (G2) re-run everything on the real VS-Bench protocol (our 0.69/0.52 subset != their 83.0/29.5 scale); (G3) drop the two dead novelty hooks (Appendix H already decomposes the user turn; 2410.02064 already built a provenance steering vector).
plan.one_paragraph: We are attacking a fresh, unusually beatable benchmark: on VS-Bench (arXiv:2605.15864, verified) the only training-free single-pass SOTA is VisualSwap's own global-2x attention amplification (54.8 on Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking, +18.2pp), with their multi-turn user instruction as the +30.9pp ceiling, and no other method (PAI/CAST/VisFlow/DMAS, or the RL method VRRL 2607.02490) evaluated here. But three honesty gates bind the whole program. (1) We MUST reproduce global-2x's +18.2pp in our own setup before any 'magnitude is neutral' claim — our neutral +225% per-head result and their uniform post-softmax 2x are DIFFERENT operations (theirs is all-heads and renormalization-unspecified), and the single decisive deliverable is a magnitude-matched control / accuracy-vs-Svis curve that is publishable whichever way it lands. (2) We MUST re-run on the actual VS-Bench protocol — our N~136 subset (0.69->0.52) is not their scale (8B-Thinking MathVerse 83.0->29.5), so no cross-scale 'beats 54.8' is valid yet. (3) Two novelty hooks are dead: VisualSwap's Appendix H (Table 15, verified) already decomposes the user-turn recovery and already shows bare turn-structure markers are negligible, and Ackerman & Panickssery (arXiv:2410.02064, verified) already built and steered a self-vs-external provenance vector — so our surviving novel slice is narrow but real: holding the re-look CONTENT fixed and flipping only authorship (the cell their decomposition confounds), as a single-pass automatic fix, plus the mechanistic dissociation that the write-gate is provenance-gated not magnitude-gated. Calibrated by the closest prior (arXiv:2604.09364, +3.8pp max for training-free steering in this exact niche), the realistic target is to BEAT single-pass global-2x (54.8) and APPROACH — not exceed — the 67.5 user ceiling, with the magnitude-vs-provenance mechanism as the headline rather than a leaderboard number. The most defensible paper is: reproduce and EXPLAIN the SOTA (money plot + source-discounting), ship a single-pass provenance fix that beats 54.8, and claim a genuinely open coverage win on ERNIE-4.5-VL and Kimi-VL, for which VisualSwap reports no fix at all.
